_doc:
Sidecar describing one PVT union. Drop this (or a renamed copy ending in '.union.json') under <unionsDir>/ — by default '<project_root>/unions/'. The 'name' field must equal the filename basename (sans '.union.json'). See docs/phase2_pvt_union_spec.md for the full reference. Keys starting with '_' are ignored by the loader.

This example mirrors the live simkit_verify corner-table as observed via skillbridge on 2026-05-12 (DECISIONS #29). It has two rows: 'TT' (single nominal corner) and 'TT_pvt' (corner-group that explodes to 6 sub-corners via 2-value VDD sweep x 3-section model sweep).
name: pvt_union_example

rows._doc_row: Sweep arrays are listed in MAESTRO STORAGE ORDER (= user declaration order at the panel), not lex-sorted. Maestro re-sorts at explode time for sub-corner indexing (see spec §3.4 rule 3). 'pvt corners pull' against the live fnxSession0 produces VDD=['3','2.8'] and section=['tt','ss','ff'] in that order.
